evals.prompt: Add a new projectile animation for a ring spell called ember lance. It needs a new visual path and should render correctly in the overlay too.
evals.expected_output: Classifies the work as projectile animation plus overlay-owned coverage, names the content ref, canvas module, Three module, generator step, and the right proof homes.
expectations: Names the projectile animation-ref surface under packages/content/src/animation-refs
Names both canvas and Three module surfaces or clearly explains fallback ownership
Includes check:three-animations or equivalent Three coverage proof

evals.prompt: I only need to retime an existing impact animation so the hit flash lands later. What files and checks matter?
evals.expected_output: Keeps the work bounded to the ref timing path, avoids unnecessary mechanic scope, and names ref-focused proofs plus generator expectations if applicable.
expectations: Treats the change as a timing or ref-focused animation task
Does not invent mechanic or gameplay work

evals.prompt: Give a persistent status effect its own pulse in the Three overlay without breaking canvas fallback.
evals.expected_output: Explains status-category animation ownership, keeps canvas fallback intact, and names the overlay ownership proofs instead of only content files.
expectations: Classifies the work as status animation
Mentions the one-owner or canvas-fallback rule
Names component or browser ownership proofs
